title: Base Hackathon: Build Onchain
description: 48-hour hackathon for builders on Base. Ship a project using Base, smart wallets, or any onchain primitive. Prizes across DeFi, NFTs, social, and infra tracks.

title: Base Ecosystem Summit
description: Annual gathering of Base builders, investors, and community members. Keynotes from Coinbase and top Base protocols, followed by networking and demo day.

title: Onchain Summer 2025
description: Base's flagship campaign returns. Mint exclusive NFTs, earn rewards, and explore the best of onchain culture built on Base.

title: Base Builder Office Hours
description: Monthly office hours with the Base team. Bring your questions about grants, technical architecture, and ecosystem opportunities. Open to all builders.

title: Base Grants Wave 3 — Application Window
description: Applications open for the third wave of Base ecosystem grants. Up to $250k available for projects building consumer apps, infrastructure, and developer tooling on Base.

title: Base at ETHDenver 2026
description: Visit the Base booth at ETHDenver. Live demos, swag, and conversations with the Base core team. Base-specific workshops running throughout the event.
